name: remote-agent-collaboration
description: Install both collaboration skills and activate exactly one role per Codex thread.

interface.shortDescription: Two explicit collaboration roles with fail-closed local protocol checks
interface.longDescription: Remote Agent Collaboration installs lead and member skills for Codex. Hooks can provide session context when trusted and observed; collabctl remains the deterministic local enforcement layer and fails closed without a real session_id.
defaultPrompt: $team-lead-collaboration Initialize and govern collaboration for this project.
$team-member-collaboration Read current announcements and work only inside my assigned module.
